attractions.name: Gavi Safari
attractions.description: Safari passing through border of Periyar Tiger reserve with chances of sighting wild animals. Passes through hills, valleys, tropical forests, grasslands, waterfalls, cardamom plantations, and Pamba Reservoir. Home to over 320 bird species and endangered species like Nilgiritahr and lion tailed macaque
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf
